text:
A multiplayer version of the classic Cluedo board game built with React, TypeScript, and Electron.

The goal was to make a web-based game feel like a real desktop game. The project includes a 1930s noir style inspired by Cuphead, smooth scene transitions, and interactive drag-and-drop gameplay.

Multiplayer logic is handled by boardgame.io for reliable turn-based state sync. The game also uses a custom AudioManager built with the Web Audio API for layered music and sound effects (which is also used in this website).
